rewrite.text:
PROVE forall n : nat, n + 0 = n  
BEGIN  
  BEGIN INDUCTION  
  PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0  
    FACT h0: 0 = 0 [BY 0_eq]  
  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S k  
    FACT hk: n + 0 = n [BY hk_eq]  
    APPLY INDUCTION_HYP: hk : n + 0 = n [BY ih]  
    SPLIT INTO: (n + 0) = n + 0 [BY n_eq]  
    CONCLUDE: Result proven  
  CONCLUDE  
END
